message:
test(labruntime): port diagnostic/orphan_reaper/policy/replay async tests (ft-22x4r)

- diagnostic_labruntime.rs: 5 tests (bundle generation, secrets, metadata)
- orphan_reaper_labruntime.rs: 4 tests (async reap, shutdown response)
- policy_labruntime.rs: 1 test (policy decision replay capture)
- replay_labruntime.rs: 5 tests (playback, stop control, events/markers)

Skipped 3 replay tests gated with #[cfg(not(feature = "asupersync-runtime"))]
and 2 policy tests requiring private field access.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
